context.setting: Working on laptop with laptop on Right

episode_text:
day=1; meal=chicken nuggets, broccoli, and ketchup; setting=Working on laptop with laptop on Right; time_of_day=noon;
preferences: microwave_time=1 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize right occlusion; robot_speed=fast; skewering_axis=perpendicular to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=inside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=not applicable; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=speech; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=autocontinue; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=speech; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=perception; retract_between_bites=no; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=10 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF working on a laptop or tablet positioned on the right AND neutral affective state AND any food condition THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to preserve visibility toward the right-side workspace.

robot_speed.user_tendencies: IF working on a laptop or tablet AND neutral affective state AND any food condition THEN fast BECAUSE the user selected a time-efficient interaction style in the observed work context. No other context-dependent variation observed yet.

web_interface_confirmation.user_tendencies: IF working on a laptop or tablet AND neutral affective state AND any food condition THEN no BECAUSE the user preferred reduced interaction overhead and accepted greater automation rather than adding an explicit bite-acquisition confirmation step.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE the user cannot lean forward due to lack of trunk control, making outside-mouth transfer physically unsuitable.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN not applicable BECAUSE the user's selected and physically appropriate transfer mode is inside mouth transfer.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF working on a laptop or tablet AND neutral affective state AND any food condition THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user cannot press buttons and chose a low-effort, highly automated initiation method rather than requiring an explicit readiness signal.

IF working on a laptop or tablet AND neutral affective state AND any food condition THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user cannot press buttons and preferred automatic progression for drink transfer initiation.

IF working on a laptop or tablet AND neutral affective state AND any food condition THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user cannot press buttons and preferred automatic progression for mouth-wiping initiation.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN perception BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons and selected the reliable low-effort completion detection method for feeding.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN perception BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons and selected perception-based completion detection for drinking.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN perception BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons and selected perception-based completion detection for mouth wiping.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF working on a laptop or tablet AND neutral affective state AND any food condition THEN no BECAUSE the user prioritized efficiency over additional retraction motions, despite also caring about right-side visibility.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND food includes a dip or sauce THEN do not dip BECAUSE in the observed meal with ketchup the user explicitly chose not to add dipping, suggesting a current tendency to avoid extra sauce application.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.user_tendencies: IF working on a laptop or tablet AND neutral affective state AND any food condition THEN 10 sec BECAUSE the user preferred rapid automatic continuation and a time-efficient workflow.
